subcodes.first_line: During the blessed days, the late Aqa Khan, a follower of Mírza Yaḥyá, came to 'Akká and, with the utmost humility and supplication, earnestly besought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ایام مبارک مرحوم آقاخان تابع میرزا یحیی بعکا آمد و بنهایت عجز و ابتهال استدعا
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
